name: smartfarm-ai
description: AI-powered agriculture assistant — crop recommendations, yield prediction, and document-grounded Q&A

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:init: cd backend && python -c "import asyncio; from app.database import init_db; asyncio.run(init_db())"
